expected: Read-only aggregation of one canonical Pipeline C Markdown per available date; six category-level Curators run in parallel; one Verifier and one Fact Extractor; Chinese monthly Markdown and DOCX with the Pipeline C story/reference structure, a visible source-coverage note, event-level deduplication, and no WebSearch.
